generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values national security, I'm glad to see our leaders pushing for strategic autonomy. The recent cyber attacks show how vulnerable we are to foreign interference. It's not just about us - our allies are counting on us to hold the line. We can't afford to weaken our defenses by getting bogged down in civil liberties debates. Let's focus on what really keeps us safe.
